content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION]
GO


SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION]
( 
	[GL_LINE_KEY] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[Module] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[BatchNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[LineNbr] [int]  NOT NULL,
	[TransactionID] [int]  NULL,
	[AccountCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SubAccount] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BranchCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[FinPeriodID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LedgerID] [int]  NULL,
	[ProjectID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProductID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SourceVendorID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DepartmentID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[MarketingAccountID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AcquisitionID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProjectTransactionID] [bigint]  NULL,
	[CustomerVendor] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ReferenceNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProjectTask] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CreditAmount] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[DebitAmount] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[BalanceAmount]  [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[PostYear] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[TransactionPeriodID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Posted] [bit]  NULL,
	[Released] [bit]  NULL,
	[Selected] [bit]  NULL,
	[SummaryPost] [bit]  NULL,
	[TaxID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[TaxCategory] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[TransactionClass] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[TransactionDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[TransactionDescription] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL,
	[TransactionLineNbr] [int]  NULL,	
	[TransactionType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[TransactionYear] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[OriginalBatchNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[OriginalLineNumber] [int]  NULL,
	[OriginalModule] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CreatedBy] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CreatedDateTime] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[LastModifiedDateTime] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ([GL_LINE_KEY]),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
